title: Index and query invariants as a registry-first kind
description:
Index the loaded invariants as a project-scoped, registry-first item kind and make them queryable through the generic item operations, addressed as `@/<self-id>`. The registry is the authoritative source; no markdown index is produced for invariants. This uses the loaded invariant registry as its input.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-01: `jit item list --kind invariant` returns a loaded invariant, addressed as `@/<self-id>`.
- [hard] REQ-02: The registry is the authoritative source for invariants; no markdown index is produced for them.
- [hard] REQ-03: The behavior is covered by `cargo test`.
